title: YMCA CAMP COLLINS - 211info
text: YMCA CAMP COLLINS YMCA CAMP COLLINS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides youth camps that include overnight and day camps. Also provides an overnight family camp. Camp programs and facility rentals are year-round, and activities change seasonally. 3001 SE Oxbow Parkway Gresham, OR 97080 Eligibility: Unrestricted, most activities are for children grades 1-12 Hours: Fall, Winter, and Spring Office Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Summer Office Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-6pm, Saturday 8am-noon, Sunday noon-6pm Email (503) 663-5813 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 663-5813 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by service. Financial assistance may be available to participants that qualify. DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon SITE HOURS: Fall, Winter, and Spring Office Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Summer Office Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-6pm, Saturday 8am-noon, Sunday noon-6pm Services: Camps Other Services Offered At This Location: SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - CHILDCARE & MORE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
